issues.description: TypelessController never delivers transcription text to the focused application or clipboard. It collects SSE chunks into a StringBuilder and saves history, but does not call TextTyper, ClipboardHelper.SetTextAndPasteAsync, or IClipboardService to surface results to the user.
evidence: TailSlap/TypelessController.cs TranscribeAsync appends chunks to fullText and then only calls _history.AppendTranscription(transcriptionText, durationMs).
The injected _clipboardHelper field is assigned in the constructor but never used anywhere in TypelessController.
No production reference to TextTyper exists, so validations like VAL-TRANS-001 and VAL-TYPE-001..010 cannot pass.

summary: TypelessController records and persists transcription text, but it does not perform the core user-facing text delivery promised by the milestone, leaving most transcription/type validations unmet.
